concepts.name: transformer
concepts.definition: In electrical engineering, a transformer is a passive component that transfers electrical energy from one electrical circuit to another circuit, or multiple circuits. A varying current in any coil of the transformer produces a varying magnetic flux in the transformer's core, which induces a varying electromotive force (EMF) across any other coils wound around the same core.
concepts.evidence_quote: we propose the Transformer, a model architecture eschewing recurrence and instead relying entirely on an attention mechanism

concepts.name: self-attention
concepts.definition:
Self-attention can mean:

Attention (machine learning), a machine learning technique
self-attention, an attribute of natural cognition.
concepts.evidence_quote: Self-attention, sometimes called intra-attention is an attention mechanism relating different positions of a single sequence

concepts.name: multi-head attention
concepts.definition: In machine learning, attention is a method that determines the importance of each component in a sequence relative to the other components in that sequence. In natural language processing, importance is represented by "soft" weights assigned to each word in a sentence.
concepts.evidence_quote: Multi-head attention allows the model to jointly attend to information from different representation subspaces

concepts.name: scaled dot-product attention
concepts.evidence_quote: We call our particular attention 'Scaled Dot-Product Attention'

concepts.name: encoder-decoder architecture
concepts.evidence_quote: Most competitive neural sequence transduction models have an encoder-decoder structure

concepts.name: recurrent neural network
concepts.definition: In artificial neural networks, recurrent neural networks (RNNs) are designed for processing sequential data, such as text, speech, and time series, where the order of elements is important. Unlike feedforward neural networks, which process inputs independently, RNNs utilize recurrent connections, where the output of a neuron at one time step is fed back as input to the network at the next time step.
concepts.evidence_quote: Recurrent neural networks, long short-term memory and gated recurrent neural networks in particular, have been firmly established

concepts.name: attention mechanism
concepts.definition: In machine learning, attention is a method that determines the importance of each component in a sequence relative to the other components in that sequence. In natural language processing, importance is represented by "soft" weights assigned to each word in a sentence.
concepts.evidence_quote: Attention mechanisms have become an integral part of compelling sequence modeling and transduction models

concepts.name: layer normalization
concepts.definition: In machine learning, normalization is a statistical technique with various applications. There are two main forms of normalization, namely data normalization and activation normalization.

concepts.name: residual connection
concepts.definition:
A residual neural network (also referred to as a residual network or ResNet) is a deep learning architecture in which the layers learn residual functions with reference to the layer inputs. It was developed in 2015 for image recognition, and won the ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge (ILSVRC) of that year.
As a point of terminology, "residual connection" refers to the specific architectural motif of 
  
    
      
        x
        ↦
        f
        (
        x
        )
        +
        x
      
    
    {\displaystyle x\mapsto f(x)+x}
  
, where 
  
    
      
        f
      
    
    {\displaystyle f}
  
 is an arbitrary neural network module.
concepts.evidence_quote: We employ a residual connection [11] around each of the two sub-layers
